name: alb
title: AWS Load Balancer — Application Load Balancer
summary: Creates an ALB with target groups, HTTP/HTTPS listeners (TLS 1.3 policy by default), path/host routing rules, optional access logs, and deletion protection on by default. Target registration is the consumer's responsibility (ASG/ECS attachment or `aws_lb_target_group_attachment` in the root module).

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: vpc_id
module.description: ID of the VPC hosting the load balancer and target groups. Supplied by ID — no framework dependency is implied.

module.name: subnet_ids
module.description: Subnet IDs for the ALB (at least two, in different AZs).

module.name: internal
module.description: Whether the ALB is internal (true) or internet-facing (false).

module.name: security_group_ids
module.description: Security group IDs attached to the ALB.

module.name: enable_deletion_protection
module.description: Enable deletion protection on the ALB (governance/resource-locks). Must be disabled and applied before destroy.

module.name: drop_invalid_header_fields
module.description: Drop HTTP headers with invalid fields (security hardening).

module.name: access_logs
module.type: object({ enabled = bool bucket = optional(string) prefix = optional(string) })
module.description: ALB access log configuration. When enabled, bucket must be an existing S3 bucket with the proper ELB log-delivery policy.

module.name: target_groups
module.type: map(object({ port = number protocol = string target_type = optional(string, "instance") deregistration_delay = optional(number, 300) health_check = optional(object({ path = optional(string, "/") port = optional(string, "traffic-port") protocol = optional(string, "HTTP") healthy_threshold = optional(number, 3) unhealthy_threshold = optional(number, 3) timeout = optional(number, 5) interval = optional(number, 30) matcher = optional(string, "200-299") }), {}) stickiness = optional(object({ enabled = bool type = optional(string, "lb_cookie") cookie_duration = optional(number, 86400) })) }))
module.description: Target groups keyed by logical name. Target registration is the consumer's responsibility (ASG attachment, ECS service, or aws_lb_target_group_attachment in the root module).

module.name: listeners
module.type: map(object({ port = number protocol = string certificate_arn = optional(string) ssl_policy = optional(string, "ELBSecurityPolicy-TLS13-1-2-2021-06") default_action = object({ type = string target_group_key = optional(string) redirect = optional(object({ port = optional(string, "443") protocol = optional(string, "HTTPS") status_code = optional(string, "HTTP_301") })) fixed_response = optional(object({ content_type = optional(string, "text/plain") message_body = optional(string, "") status_code = optional(string, "404") })) }) rules = optional(map(object({ priority = number target_group_key = string path_patterns = optional(list(string), []) host_headers = optional(list(string), []) })), {}) }))
module.description: Listeners keyed by logical name with a default action and optional path/host routing rules.

outputs.name: lb_id
outputs.description: ARN of the application load balancer.

outputs.name: lb_dns_name
outputs.description: Public or internal DNS name of the ALB.

outputs.name: lb_zone_id
outputs.description: Route 53 hosted zone ID of the ALB (for alias records).

outputs.name: listener_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical listener name to listener ARN.

outputs.name: backend_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical target group name to target group ARN. Register targets against these in the consumer root module.

outputs.name: listener_rule_ids
outputs.description: Map of '<listener-key>/<rule-key>' to listener rule ARN.
